# Staging Polish PR Template

## Description
Summary of the polishing and verification changes made to the website.

## Checklist
- [ ] Staging verification fields updated in `restaurant.json`
- [ ] Desktop/mobile layout checked
- [ ] Address, phone, hours, and menus verified
- [ ] Floating comparison button added and tested
- [ ] Cleaned up unused assets or temporary files
- [ ] Staging validation command passes locally
